embeds.title: Quantum Garden - Interactive Generative Art
embeds.description: A mesmerizing blend of organic fractal growth and quantum mechanics visualization. Click anywhere to plant quantum seeds and watch as beautiful, glowing botanical structures emerge, surrounded by dancing particles that exhibit quantum behavior.

fields.name: ✨ Features
fields.value:
• Procedurally generated fractal plants
• Quantum particle effects with probability clouds
• Interactive mouse-responsive particles
• Dynamic color palette shifts
• Ambient quantum field visualization

fields.name: 🎨 Interactive Elements
fields.value:
• **Click** to plant quantum seeds
• **Move** mouse to interact with particles
• **Watch** as quantum particles exhibit uncertainty behavior

fields.name: 🔬 Quantum Mechanics
fields.value: Particles demonstrate quantum properties including probability distributions, uncertainty principles, and quantum entanglement visualizations

footer.text: Generated by Mira • Hourly Creative Experiment
